name: entities-extract
changelog-parse
prompt:
Parse this changelog entry into JSON:

```
## v2.4.0 — 2026-04-12
- fix: prevent crash when uploading files larger than 100MB
- feat: add dark mode toggle in settings
- docs: clarify rate-limit behavior in README
- refactor: split monolithic auth module into smaller files
```

Respond with ONLY a JSON object in exactly this shape (no prose):

{
  "version": "<string>",
  "date": "<YYYY-MM-DD>",
  "entries": [
    {"kind": "fix" | "feat" | "docs" | "refactor", "text": "<string>"}
  ]
}

The text field is the description without the kind prefix.

name: recipe-extract
error-report-parse
prompt:
Parse this error report into JSON:

```
[ERROR] code=DB_TIMEOUT severity=high
  in src/api/users.ts:142
  Connection to primary read replica timed out after 5000ms.
  Three retries attempted; all failed with the same error.
```

Respond with ONLY a JSON object in exactly this shape (no prose):

{
  "code": "<string>",
  "severity": "low" | "medium" | "high",
  "context": {
    "file": "<string>",
    "line": <integer>,
    "details": "<string>"
  }
}

The details field is the human-readable description of the error.

name: contact-card
prompt:
Convert this contact card into JSON:

```
Name: Alex Cordeiro
Emails: alex@example.com, alex.work@example.org
GitHub: alexcorde
Mastodon: @alex@hachyderm.io
```

Respond with ONLY a JSON object in exactly this shape (no prose):

{
  "name": "<string>",
  "emails": ["<string>", ...],
  "social": {
    "github": "<string>",
    "mastodon": "<string>"
  }
}
